order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and modern Spring ecosystem.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and lacks compatibility with Spring Framework 6, causing runtime failures or missing features on JDK 21.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce the new baseline.

order-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui to support Spring Boot 3.
order-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact (springdoc-openapi-ui) is incompatible with Spring Boot 3/Spring Framework 6, leading to classpath conflicts or runtime errors.

payment-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support and modern framework features.
payment-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; using it with Java 21 may cause runtime compatibility issues or lack of support for newer language features.

payment-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
payment-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run against Java 21; keeping it at 17 would result in incorrect source/target compatibility settings.

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE migration.
payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3.x applications targeting Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compile error (cannot find symbol) if the old import is retained.

payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
payment-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set the Maven compiler release property to target Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against the default JDK version (likely 17 or lower), failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used.

stock-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 support and modern Spring ecosystem standards.
stock-service/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline; using it with Java 21 may cause runtime incompatibilities or lack of support for newer language features.

stock-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
stock-service/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must explicitly target Java 21 to compile and run on the new JDK; otherwise, it defaults to the old version or fails to utilize Java 21 features.

stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x and Java EE/Jakarta EE standards.
stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the default classpath of Spring Boot 3.x applications targeting Jakarta EE 9+, causing a compile-time 'package javax.annotation does not exist' error.

stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.

stock-service/src/main/java/pl/piomin/st.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing compile errors for missing classes.
